titleStmt.title: SII 26.8: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 8. (A.R. No. 8 of 1909.) POṈ-AMARĀVATI, TIRUMAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Chōḷēśvara temple.

This inscription records the grant, as dēvaḍimaikāṇi, of six mā of land and six house-sites to a dancing girl named Māṇi and her relatives who were dedicated to the service of god Rājēndraśōḷīśvaram-uḍaiya-nayiṉār at Poṉṉamarāpati in Puṟamalai-nāḍu for the merit of Varāhakaṇḍiyadēvaṉ, a Kaikkōḷa of the Aḻagiya-śokkaṉār temple at Madurai.
Cf. Inscriptions (Texts) of the Pudukkottai State, No. 817.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . cakāptam 1000 4 100l mel cellāniṉṟa viḷampi
varuṣam Aṟpaci mātam 2 10 8 . puṟamalaināṭṭu poṉṉamarāpatiyil Uṭaiyār
Irācentiracoḷicuramuṭaiya nayiṉāṟku maturaiyil [�]aḻakiyacokkaṉār koyiṟ
kaikkoḷaril muṉṉaṭaivu Āvuṭaiyār śrīvarākakaṇṭiyatevaṉ taṉmamāka
tevaṭimaiyākaviṭṭa māṇikku Ivaḷ makaṉ Ilakkappaṉum periya mutaliyum I
vaḷ makaḷ cantaṉattāyaḻakiyārum Ivaḷ taṅkai mālaiyārum Ivaḷ tampi
nayiṉāṉum ne Ivaḷ makaṉ pottaracaṉum Ivaṉ tampi piccaṉum Āka Ivar
kaḷai caṉṉatiyil tiruccūlattāpaṉamum paṇṇittantamaikku Ivarkaḷukkut tiru
mukakkāṇiyāka Ilakkaikku Iṉṉayiṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa vicaṅku
ṉṟa vayalil Irācaṉerikkuṭikkāṭu Uṭpaṭa viṭṭa nilam çcul vicaṅkuṉṟakkuḷattil mu
ṟai viḻukkāṭṭile Iraṇṭu mā nilattukkut taṇṇirum viṭṭu Ikkuṭikāṭṭil muṉ
kuḷappuṉcaiyum Irācaneriyāṉ maḻavarāyanallūr vayalil viṭṭa nilam pacu Āka nilam 6mā(mā)
tirumaṭaiviḷākkattil viṭṭa nācciyār koyilukku vaṭaciṟakil maṉai Āṟum muṉṉaṭai
vu Āka Immariyāti cattirātittavaraiyum tevaṭimai kāṇiyāka
naṭantu potakkaṭavārkaḷ Ākavum Ippaṭikku Ivai Ikkoyi
l kaṇakku tappillāveḷār Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.8 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
